rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MANGAN VS. KEY MORTGAGE CORP DBA KMC MORTGAGE CORP

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday 11, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFF ANDREA MANGAN's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File 3rd Amended Complaint. 1) Deny as to misrepresentation; 2) Grant as to other request. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MANGAN VS. KEY MORTGAGE CORP DBA KMC MORTGAGE CORP
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Gmac Mortgage Llc, Ets Services Llc And Mortgage Leectronic Registration Systems, Inc.S' Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday 11, 2012, line 1. Defendants Gmac Mortgage Llc, Ets Services Llc And Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc.S' Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Second Amended Complaint. Sustain with leave to amend as to first cause of action to allege plaintiff's performance under contract. Overrule as to second, third, fourth, fifth and sixth causes of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LISA ABER VS. WOLTERS KLUWER UNITED STATES INC., A NEW YORK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reasonble Attorneys Fees And Costs; Compendium;
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday 11, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF LISA ABER's Motion For Reasonble Attorneys Fees And Costs. Grant $62,299.60 as attorney fees and costs. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DE ANZA FLP VS. STERLING BANK et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday 11, 2012, line 3. CROSS COMPLAINANT STERLING SAVINGS BANK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend as to first through fifth causes of action to allege whether property residential and owner occupied. Sustain with leave to amend as to second, third and fifth causes of action, requisite particularity needed; fourth cause of action, verification and allegation of adverse claim needed. Sustain without leave to amend as to sixth cause of action declaratory relief. = (501/REQ)
